role_in_text: Company that developed a logical qubit from a physical qubit
occurrence_sentence: Our team at Nord Quantique is very proud to be the first company to extend the lifetime of a logical qubit without a large overhead of physical qubits dedicated to error correction, as most other systems have.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: Nord

mentions.role_in_text: Demonstrated quantum error correction to improve qubit coherence lifetime.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Nord Quantique demonstrated quantum error correction to improve qubit coherence lifetime at the individual qubit level.
Nord Quantique, a quantum computing startup with an industry leading approach to error correction, today announced promising results from its latest research paper.
Nord Quantique, a quantum computing startup with an industry leading approach to error correction, today announced promising results from its latest research paper.

mentions.role_in_text: Company that developed a logical qubit from a physical qubit
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Our team at Nord Quantique is very proud to be the first company to extend the lifetime of a logical qubit without a large overhead of physical qubits dedicated to error correction, as most other systems have.

The company believes this three-pronged combination of efficient error correction, fast computational speeds and a clear road to scaling makes its systems ideally suited for problems such as the simulations required in the materials science and pharmaceutical industries, as well as several other sectors which can benefit from advanced calculations using deep circuits and complex algorithms.
